_comment: RI Canon Opportunity: Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor Selection. Canon event: Wang Lin is selected as the 6th-Generation Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor. Per user directive: every canon event must be accessible in-game.
name: Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor Selection
canon_event: Wang Lin is selected as the 6th-Generation Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor
why_untaken: Requires Spirit Severing+ cultivation; the Vermilion Bird must choose you.
natural_next_event: The Vermilion Bird awakens and selects the next Divine Emperor.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
